Required evidence: At least one object has Phase exactly equal to the phase id.
Rendering rule: Render direct object hyperlinks. Do not aggregate child phase objects as direct ownership.

Meaning: Phase is an umbrella/routing/scope phase; objects are owned by child phases.
Required evidence: No direct objects and at least one descendant phase has direct object(s).
Rendering rule: Render scope-only plus a bounded child-object summary.

Meaning: Phase intentionally has no direct object, e.g. baseline, audit, closeout, generator/view infrastructure without object ownership.
Required evidence: No direct objects and no descendant-object ownership needed for the phase semantics, plus explanation.
Rendering rule: Render no direct object with reason; never leave cell blank.

Meaning: Historical placeholder or routing note whose active objects are owned elsewhere.
Required evidence: Main goal/definition/proof goal identifies the destination phase or ownership move.
Rendering rule: Render moved placeholder and reason/destination; no direct object links unless the placeholder also owns an explicit audit object.
